source.derivation: Derived midpoint between entry/junior implementation style and senior ownership style because no dedicated mid-level folder exists.
source.contentPolicy: Use source files as layout and writing-style references only. Mid-level content should be generated from the JD and candidate data.

summary.heading: Professional Summary
summary.format: single paragraph or two compact paragraphs
summary.writingStyle: independent software engineer with ownership of features, services, APIs, testing, deployment, and production support

skills.heading: Skills
skills.writingStyle: broad enough for ATS but less exhaustive than senior; put JD-critical skills first

workExperience.heading: Work Experience
workExperience.bulletCount: 8-10 for current role, 5-8 for previous roles (minimum 5 per job)

bulletWriting.pattern: Action verb + owned feature/service + technology + measurable or concrete outcome

projects.heading: Projects
projects.writingStyle: include projects only if they strengthen JD alignment or demonstrate a target technology

aiInstructions.layoutPriority: Use summary and skills before work experience for ATS alignment.
aiInstructions.contentGeneration: Generate mid-level content showing independent delivery and ownership of services/features.
aiInstructions.jdTailoring: Translate JD responsibilities into feature/service bullets without senior-level exaggeration.
aiInstructions.outputRequirement: Return structured resume JSON matching this blueprint; do not return markdown.
